institution.name: The College of Health Care Professions-Northwest

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at The College of Health Care Professions-Northwest fell 42% between 2019 and 2022 (50.0% → 29.1%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at The College of Health Care Professions-Northwest rose 20% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.5k → $6.6k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at The College of Health Care Professions-Northwest fell 13% between 2017 and 2020 (84.8% → 74.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at The College of Health Care Professions-Northwest rose 51% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0k → 4.5k).
